title: Resolve zeta/kappa condition: ZK5: kappa residual exterior-neutral branch
description: Sector: kappa_residual. Allowed condition: C_kappa = 0 outside, with no boundary shell and no recovery-tuned support. Forbidden condition: kappa_tail = C_kappa/r with C_kappa != 0. Consequence: neutral kappa residual metric trace is theorem-heavy but possible as a target.
